documentation.file_docstring: Fetch the model catalog from the gateway. Accepts a {@link GatewayBrowserClient} (matching the existing ui/ controller convention).  Returns an array of {@link ModelCatalogEntry}; on failure the caller receives an empty array rather than throwing.
